title: HeroQuest - Episode 3 - Customizing HeroQuest for Solo Play Without an App
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tdc-zfxIlEY

Daniel (@dungeondive) concludes the three-part HeroQuest series with the episode solo players have been waiting for: how to customise HeroQuest for solo play without relying on an app. This is a deep dive — over an hour of card supplements, house rules, and systems for replacing the Zargon player with something that actually works.

The approach is methodical. Daniel walks through the specific card packs and third-party supplements that make solo HeroQuest viable, explains the logic behind each modification, and demonstrates how the pieces fit together into a coherent solo experience. It's less a quick hack and more a considered overhaul for players who want to take HeroQuest seriously as a solo dungeon crawler.

----

Do you prefer app-assisted solo modes or fully analogue solutions?
